docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSTON, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT BROWDER, ROYCE BROWER. ROY DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-27-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-26-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-09-1998
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-03-1998 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-03-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON MAR-03-1998, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-18-1998 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-27-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY STEVEN D HOWARD HEARING SET FOR MAY-06-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-06-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-06-1998, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. TO PAY ALL SANCTIONS IMPOSED. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY STEVEN D HOWARD, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-21-1998 CONTINUED FROM MAY-06-1998 TO JUN-10-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-10-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY STEVEN D HOWARD. HEARING SET FOR JUL-08-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
